chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P.No.D-1172 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on MA-5309/2024 2. For orders on office objections 3. For orders on MA- 5310/2024 4. For hearing of main case. 31-07-2024 Petitioner present in person. 1. Granted. 2,3&4. Petitioner has preferred this petition on behalf of his son, who is sui juris. Petitioner remained unable to befall himself within the category of the aggrieved persons within the meaning of Article 199 of the Constitution. Petition is found to be misconceived, hence, dismissed in limine. Judge Judge Ahmed/Pa
